summary: Iteration 220 — Testing P0.1 UI Redesign of IstruttoriaPage. All 16 tests passed (100%). Backend: 2/2 API tests passed. Frontend: 14/14 UI tests passed. New features verified: Card 'Esito Istruttoria' with normativa/profilo/confidenza/motivazione, Progress bar (3/3 conferme), Quick response buttons with toggle behavior, 'Proposta AI' badge, 'Completate' badge, Collapsible tech details section, Punti incerti box, CTA bar with green 'Conferma Istruttoria' button.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: istr_701cc0cc1ddc with 3 domande_residue, all 3 answered
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 220 P0.1 redesign fully tested. Key features: 1) Card 'Esito Istruttoria' (data-testid='card-esito-istruttoria') shows normativa, profilo, confidenza, motivazione AI. 2) Progress section (data-testid='progress-section') shows N/M conferme date. 3) Quick buttons (data-testid='quick-btn-{i}-{option}') fill textarea on click, clear on second click (toggle). 4) 'Proposta AI' badge visible when not confirmed. 5) 'Completate' badge when all questions answered. 6) CTA bar (data-testid='card-conferma') shows green 'Conferma Istruttoria' when all answered, grey 'Conferma Comunque' otherwise. 7) Collapsible tech details (data-testid='toggle-tech-details'). 8) Punti incerti box visible when ambiguities exist.

elements_verified: toggle behavior (click fills, click again clears)
